The samples employed in the measurements were right
metallic cylinders 2 cm in diameter and 2 cm high.
They were fabricated out of isotopically separated
material enriched to greater than 95 at. %. The
samples were mounted 2 m from the source on a
rotating wheel with their cylindrical bases
